allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re data = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Extract string literals that look like content strings = re.findall\(r''""\([^""]{20,300}\)""'', data\) for s in strings[:150]: if not s.startswith\(''/''\) and not s.startswith\(''http''\) and not any\(c in s for c in [''\\\\n'', ''\\\\t'', ''{'', ''}'', ''\('', ''\)'', ''=>'', ''function'']\): print\(s\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re data = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Look for component content - text that looks like headings or paragraphs strings = re.findall\(r''[""]\(Thornburgh[^""]*|Green[^""]*|Utopia[^""]*|Welcome[^""]*|About[^""]*|Contact[^""]*|Home[^""]*|Mission[^""]*|Community[^""]*|Nature[^""]*|Sustainability[^""]*|Environment[^""]*\)["" ]'', data\) for s in strings[:50]: print\(repr\(s\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re data = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Find nav items nav = re.findall\(r''href:""\([^""]+\)"".*?label:""\([^""]+\)""'', data\) for n in nav[:20]: print\(n\) # Also find color/theme patterns colors = re.findall\(r''#\([0-9a-fA-F]{6}\)'', data\) from collections import Counter cc = Counter\(colors\) print\(''--- Top colors ---''\) for c, count in cc.most_common\(20\): print\(f''#{c}: {count}''\) ")

Bash(python3-c " import sys, re data = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Look for nav/section structure nav_patterns = re.findall\(r''href:""\(#[^""]+\)""'', data\) print\(''Anchors:'', set\(nav_patterns\)\) # Look for statistics stats = re.findall\(r''\([\\d,\\.]+%?[\\s]+\(?:square|million|km|residents|metro|parks|stations|percent\)[^""]{0,100}\)'', data\) for s in stats[:20]: print\(s\) # Look for image URLs imgs = re.findall\(r''\(https://[^\\s""]+\(?:jpg|jpeg|png|webp|svg\)[^\\s""]*\)'', data\) for img in imgs[:20]: print\(img\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(b[''name'']\) for b in data]")
